The '''''Drunk Dancer''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]]. She was approximately 150 meters long, and was similar in appearance to a [[CR70 corvette/Legends|CR70 corvette]], but with a circular bridge module. She was equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] emplacements, and a starboard [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] that housed the crew's [[Dropship/Legends|dropship]] and was capable of also holding craft as large as an [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]]. The ship was crewed by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jula Shryne]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Ralph_McQuarrie_art_of_captive_Falcon_on_Imperial_capital_planet_of_Alderaan.png|thumb|left|150px|A ship on Alderaan matching the description of the ''Drunk Dancer''.]]
The ship is described looking similar to the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] ship concept (originally purposed to be the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], yet later scrapped for resembling too closely the ''Eagle 1'' from [[Wikipedia:Space: 1999|''Space: 1999'']]).
